footer.tagline: Reliable engineering and product delivery for corporate software initiatives.

home.heroSubtitle: We deliver scalable software and digital product services across web, mobile, backend, and AI for companies and growing teams.
home.servicesSubtitle: End-to-end software development services tailored to your needs.
home.techSubtitle: We leverage industry-leading tools and frameworks to deliver robust, scalable solutions.
home.projectsSubtitle: Real-world products built by our team.
home.ctaSectionSubtitle: Let's collaborate and turn your idea into a reality. Our team is ready to deliver.

services.webDesc: Modern, performant web applications using Next.js, Angular, and Blazor with .NET Core backends.
services.mobileDesc: Cross-platform mobile applications that deliver exceptional user experiences on iOS and Android.
services.gameDesc: Engaging game experiences built with industry-standard tools and creative design.
services.aiDesc: Intelligent automation solutions powered by AI agents to streamline your business workflows.
services.backendDesc: Scalable APIs and microservices using Go, Node.js, and .NET Core with PostgreSQL and Redis.
services.devopsDesc: CI/CD pipelines, Docker containerization, and self-hosted or cloud server management.

projects.heroSubtitle: Products built with the delivery standards of WowSyler Software & Technology.
projects.textManipulatorDesc: An autonomous text manipulation tool featuring a powerful workflow system. Chain multiple text operations — trim, append to line ends, replace values — into a single seamless flow. Designed for developers and content creators who need repeatable, automated text processing.
projects.textManipulatorLong: TextManipulator.com combines a Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS frontend with a Go backend focused on repeatable workflow execution. RabbitMQ and Redis coordinate asynchronous text-processing jobs, PostgreSQL stores workflow data reliably, and Grafana plus Uptime Kuma provide visibility into performance, availability, and operational health.
projects.airdropBotDesc: A professional, proxy-supported bot for hunting airdrops across EVM-compatible blockchain networks. Features multi-wallet support, unpredictable transaction timing to avoid detection, and each wallet is assigned its own IP address for maximum safety.
projects.airdropBotLong: AirdropBotPro.com combines a Next.js and Tailwind CSS dashboard with ASP.NET Core API services and Node.js automation workers for high-volume wallet orchestration. PostgreSQL, Redis, and RabbitMQ keep campaign state, queues, and scheduling predictable, while Grafana and Prometheus provide observability over bot activity and infrastructure.
projects.streeaDesc: A comprehensive content discovery platform for movies, series, games, books, and music. Users can browse information, read articles and reviews, comment, rate, and add content. Features a personal timeline and a unique cross-content relationship system.
projects.streeaLong: Streea.com is designed as a content platform backed by a modern distributed architecture. A Next.js and Tailwind CSS frontend works with .NET Core services, Python data processors, RabbitMQ event flows, PostgreSQL, Redis, Elasticsearch, and Grafana/Prometheus observability to power discovery, indexing, and personalization.

about.heroSubtitle: A software team combining modern product engineering with dependable corporate delivery.
about.storyText1: WowSyler Software & Technology was founded with a clear mission: to build software that creates measurable business value. What started as a focused engineering team has evolved into a software company delivering web, mobile, backend, and AI solutions with a disciplined delivery mindset.
about.storyText2: Our name reflects our ambition — we aim to create products that make people say "wow." Every line of code we write, every interface we design, and every system we architect is crafted with excellence in mind.
about.storyText3: Today, WowSyler Software & Technology serves clients across industries with robust, scalable, and maintainable applications. We take pride in building products that are not only modern, but also operationally reliable and ready for long-term growth.
about.missionText: To deliver world-class software solutions that empower businesses and delight users — by combining technical excellence with creative innovation.

values.qualityDesc: We never cut corners. Every project is built to the highest standards, from architecture to UI.
values.innovationDesc: We stay ahead of the curve, adopting new technologies and approaches to deliver better solutions.
values.transparencyDesc: We communicate openly with clients and stakeholders throughout every stage of development.
values.ownershipDesc: We treat every project as if it were our own product — with dedication, care, and pride.
values.collaborationDesc: We partner closely with our clients, treating their goals as our own to deliver the best outcomes.
values.deliveryDesc: We respect deadlines and set realistic expectations, ensuring projects ship when promised.

about.expertiseSubtitle: Production-ready stacks we actively use across frontend, services, data, automation, and observability layers.

techGroupDescriptions.experience: We build user-facing experiences with modern interface stacks optimized for speed, usability, and iteration.
techGroupDescriptions.platform: We structure business logic with modular .NET, Go, Node.js, and Python services that scale cleanly.
techGroupDescriptions.data: We design persistence, cache, queue, and search layers together to support growth from day one.
techGroupDescriptions.ops: We rely on production tooling that makes deployment, monitoring, and day-to-day operations measurable.
techGroupDescriptions.automation: We bring LLM integrations, workflow automation, and observability together to ship practical AI systems.

contact.heroSubtitle: Have a project in mind? We'd love to hear about it. Reach out and let's make something great together.
contact.successMessage: Your message has been sent! We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.errorMessage: Your message could not be sent right now. Please try again shortly.
contact.infoText: We're always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your vision.
contact.readyText: Every great product starts with a conversation. Send us a message and we'll get back to you quickly.

services.heroSubtitle: We build scalable products with Next.js, .NET Core, Go, Python, PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Elasticsearch, and modern observability stacks from concept to production.
services.capabilitiesSubtitle: We deliver services that work as one product team across UX, APIs, data, infrastructure, and observability.
services.webDesc: We build fast, SEO-aware, and scalable web products with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Angular, and Blazor. When needed, we back those experiences with .NET Core, Go, and Node.js services.
services.mobileDesc: We ship products quickly with React Native and add native layers with Swift and Kotlin whenever the product requires deeper platform integration. The result is a consistent iOS and Android experience without sacrificing speed.
mobileFeatures: App Store / Google Play release flows
services.gameDesc: We approach interactive experiences together with backend services, user data, and live operations. That lets us design gamified products and content platforms that remain sustainable after launch.
services.aiDesc: We build automation systems with Python-based processors, LLM integrations, and workflow agents that accelerate operations. We also make those systems production-ready with queue, search, and observability layers.
services.backendDesc: We design high-performance services with ASP.NET Core API, .NET Core, Go, and Node.js. We combine PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, and Elasticsearch to build data, cache, queue, and search layers that grow with the product.
services.devopsDesc: We set up Docker-based delivery pipelines, self-hosted infrastructure, and modern monitoring layers. With Grafana, Prometheus, and Uptime Kuma, we make the health of your systems visible and actionable.
services.stackSectionSubtitle: Technology clusters we repeatedly use to build scalable architectures across products and client solutions.

stackGroups.experienceDesc: We use modern interface technologies for performance, usability, and fast iteration across user-facing experiences.
stackGroups.platformDesc: We structure business logic with modular services, background workers, and integration layers.
stackGroups.dataDesc: We design persistence, cache, messaging, and search layers together so products can handle scale and growth cleanly.
stackGroups.opsDesc: We make deployment and operations measurable, so the product stays reliable and transparent in production.

services.proofSubtitle: Our service offering is backed by the same stacks and architectural decisions we already use in our own products.
services.ctaText: Contact our team and let's discuss how we can help you achieve your goals.

legalPages.contactText: For privacy, personal data, or legal requests, please use the contact form or the published contact channel. Requests are reviewed in line with applicable Turkish legislation and operational obligations.

pdpl.title: PDPL Information Notice
pdpl.subtitle: This notice summarizes how personal data may be processed when you visit our website or contact our team under Turkish Law No. 6698.

sections.title: Data controller
paragraphs: This website is operated by WowSyler Software & Technology. For personal data processed through website communication flows, project inquiries, and business contact channels, the company acts as the data controller.

sections.title: Categories of data we may process
paragraphs: The scope of processed data depends on your interaction with us. We aim to collect only the minimum information required for communication, security, and service continuity.
bullets: Identity and contact information you voluntarily submit through the contact form or email.
Message content, project details, and correspondence records shared during business communication.
Technical connection, IP, browser, and security records created by hosting, CDN, and infrastructure layers.
Request, approval, and follow-up records required for operational or legal compliance.

sections.title: Purposes and legal grounds
paragraphs: Personal data may be processed to respond to your inquiries, evaluate potential projects, manage business communication, maintain platform security, and fulfill legal obligations.
bullets: Executing requested pre-contractual communication and evaluating service demand.
Protecting website continuity, infrastructure security, and operational reliability.
Documenting communication records when required for legitimate interests or legal obligations.

sections.title: Transfers, storage, and retention
paragraphs: Data may be processed with carefully selected hosting, CDN, infrastructure, and email delivery providers where required for the operation of the website and communication channels. Access is limited to authorized personnel and service providers acting within their service scope.
We do not sell personal data. Records are retained only for the period reasonably necessary for communication, security, compliance, or future contractual review.

sections.title: Your rights
paragraphs: Subject to applicable law, you may request information about whether your personal data is processed, ask for correction or update, request deletion where legally possible, and object to certain processing activities.
bullets: Request information about data processing activities.
Ask for inaccurate or outdated data to be corrected.
Request deletion, anonymization, or restriction where legal conditions are met.
Submit questions or rights requests through the contact channel published on this website.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.subtitle: How we collect, use, store, and protect information connected to this website and our business communications.

sections.title: Scope
paragraphs: This policy applies to information collected through the WowSyler website, contact form submissions, direct email communication, and technical website operations.

sections.title: Information we collect
paragraphs: We collect only information that is relevant to communication, project evaluation, service continuity, and security.
bullets: Contact details and business inquiry content voluntarily shared by visitors.
Technical metadata such as IP, device, browser, and request logs generated by infrastructure services.
Operational communication records needed to respond to requests or follow up on potential engagements.

sections.title: How information is used
paragraphs: Collected information is used to respond to inquiries, evaluate potential projects, manage communication history, protect the website, and improve operational reliability.
bullets: Responding to contact requests and partnership inquiries.
Reviewing project scope, technical needs, and service fit.
Monitoring misuse, abuse, or technical anomalies affecting the website.

sections.title: Security and retention
paragraphs: We aim to protect information through limited access, reputable infrastructure providers, and operational safeguards appropriate to the scale of the website.
Information is retained only as long as it remains necessary for communication, legitimate business review, legal compliance, or technical security.

sections.title: Third-party services and updates
paragraphs: The website may rely on third-party hosting, CDN, and email infrastructure providers to remain available and functional. If our privacy practices materially change, this page will be updated accordingly.
We do not currently operate user accounts or behavior-based advertising profiles through this website.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.subtitle: Information about cookies and similar technical mechanisms used for website continuity, security, and performance.

sections.title: What are cookies?
paragraphs: Cookies are small data files or similar technical identifiers that may be stored in a browser or used during a request to support continuity, security, and user experience.

sections.title: What may be used on this site
paragraphs: Our current setup is intentionally lightweight. Where required, we may rely on essential technical mechanisms provided by the application, hosting, CDN, or security layers.
bullets: Essential session or request continuity mechanisms required for secure page delivery.
Infrastructure-level security, rate-limiting, caching, or abuse-prevention identifiers.
Technical storage strictly required to keep the website available and reliable.

sections.title: What we do not intentionally use
paragraphs: We do not intentionally rely on advertising, remarketing, or non-essential behavioral tracking cookies as part of the current website setup.

sections.title: Managing cookies
paragraphs: Most browsers allow you to review, block, or delete cookies through their privacy settings. Blocking essential cookies may affect the availability or security behavior of certain website functions.

sections.title: Future changes
paragraphs: If analytics, marketing, or additional non-essential technologies are introduced in the future, this policy will be updated before or alongside that change.

legalInformation.title: Legal Information
legalInformation.subtitle: General legal notices governing the website operator, service descriptions, published content, and communication channels.

sections.title: Website operator
paragraphs: This website is operated by WowSyler Software & Technology and is used to present company capabilities, project references, and communication channels related to software services.

sections.title: Informational nature of content
paragraphs: Service descriptions, project references, technical capabilities, and other published information are presented for general informational purposes. They may be updated, expanded, or refined over time.

sections.title: Intellectual property
paragraphs: Unless otherwise stated, the design, written content, brand elements, and software-related materials published on this website belong to their respective rights holders. Unauthorized copying or misleading reuse is not permitted.

sections.title: Limitation of liability
paragraphs: We aim to keep the website accurate and available, but availability, completeness, or uninterrupted access cannot be guaranteed in every circumstance. Visitors should not interpret website content as legal, financial, or binding contractual advice.

sections.title: Applicable law and communication
paragraphs: These legal notices are interpreted in line with the laws of the Republic of Turkey. For corporate, legal, or communication-related questions, visitors may use the contact channels published on the website.
